/index.cjs(1,1): error TS9006: Declaration emit for this file requires using private name 'Private' from module '"/node_modules/@types/pkg/index"'. An explicit type annotation may unblock declaration emit.


==== /index.cjs (1 errors) ====
    Object.defineProperty(exports, "api", { value: require("pkg") });
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS9006: Declaration emit for this file requires using private name 'Private' from module '"/node_modules/@types/pkg/index"'. An explicit type annotation may unblock declaration emit.
    
==== /node_modules/@types/pkg/index.d.ts (0 errors) ====
    interface Private {}
    declare const obj: { fn(x: Private): void };
    export = obj;
